narrative:
Jeffersonville (precinct in Fayette County) has 638 registered voters, with 68.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a clear Republican lean of 9.6 percentage points.
